nasb.text: There is one who pretends to be rich, but has nothing; Another pretends to be poor, but has great wealth.

esv.text: One pretends to be rich, yet has nothing; another pretends to be poor, yet has great wealth.

cnv.text: 有人自充富足，卻一無所有； 有人假裝貧窮，財物卻極多。

ccb.text: 有人强充富有， 其实身无分文； 有人假装贫穷， 却是腰缠万贯。

csbs.text: 有人假作富有，却一无所有； 有人假作贫穷，却多有财物。
